title: Thai-Style Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew inspired by the cuisine of Thailand, made with tender beef and a medley of fresh vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add oregano, fish sauce, brown sugar, and curry paste; cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add beef broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until beef is tender.
Stir in coconut milk and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Add basil and red bell pepper; cook for 2 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with additional basil and cheese (if using).
Optional: serve with steamed rice or noodles.
